description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean white walls and large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front facade is distinguished by a long balcony with a decorative white railing and a green artificial grass strip, as well as a yellow bench and a visible utility meter. The interior layout is partially visible, revealing multiple rooms, built-in shelving, and a kitchen area with appliances. The roof is flat, and the house is surrounded by a low parapet wall, enhancing its urban character. The windows are arranged in wide horizontal bands, and the main entryway is marked by a double glass door beneath the balcony. Minimalist landscaping with potted plants is present on the side, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large horizontal windows, a balcony with white railings, and a minimalist white facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony with white railings, green artificial grass, yellow bench, and main double glass entry door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large horizontal windows and partial interior layout, including visible shelving and kitchen area.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by wide, floor-to-ceiling windows and a clear view into the living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal window openings, visible potted plant, and a glimpse of the balcony railing.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass door beneath balcony, no steps, with decorative railing and adjacent bench
